item.description:
What’s new in 0.2.4

  • New: In-app Feedback, Roadmap, What’s New, and privacy-safe bug reporting powered by UserJot
  • New: Release notes now sync automatically to UserJot and the Lunarbeam website changelog
  • New: Redesigned home composer with the full agent, model, and reasoning controls before the first prompt
  • New: Component cards now include true Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile previews plus instant page-usage navigation
  • New: Updated Lunarbeam app icon across the app, Dock, installer, and release build
  • Improved: The Lunar Agent sidebar now uses a cleaner, flatter Codex-inspired design
  • Improved: Best-quality focused edits run thoroughly and continue automatically when they need more time
  • Improved: Component and element edits stay locked to the exact target selected by the user
  • Fixed: New website generation now verifies that the agent changed real files and automatically continues incomplete builds
  • Fixed: Model selection is passed correctly to every provider, with clearer handling for incompatible Codex versions
  • Fixed: Interrupted generations save their recovery state and resume automatically after temporary connection failures
  • Fixed: Component extraction locks conflicting canvas actions until the operation finishes
  • Fixed: Renamed components keep their current identity for later edits, and shared previews no longer display the wrong page or component
  • Fixed: Component previews are faster and sharper, preserve responsive layouts, and restore the correct Desktop height after switching breakpoints
